name: get_tax_insights
description: Analyses the user's portfolio for tax optimization opportunities. Returns: LTCG (long-term capital gains) harvesting candidates with amounts and whether they fall within the ₹1L tax-free threshold, crypto tax notes (30% flat rate), Section 80C utilization and remaining limit with ELSS recommendations, and other deduction opportunities (NPS 80CCD, HRA, home loan).
